audit_items.proof_trace: `assetOutAmount` is computed once as a local variable at line 442 and cannot be altered by the intervening callback because `s_entered = true` blocks any re-entry into `bid()` (line 415-418). `safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), assetOutAmount)` at line 453 transfers exactly that value (reverts on failure), so the balance increases by exactly `assetOutAmount` for standard ERC-20 tokens. The `asset == assetOut` scenario is structurally impossible because `performUpkeep` never sets `s_auctionStarts[assetOut]`, so `bid(assetOut)` would revert at the `auctionStart == 0` check (line 425).
